name: Brazil
welcome: Olá! Welcome to Brazil — home of the world's biggest rainforest and amazing wildlife!
summary: Brazil is the largest country in South America.
It is home to the Amazon rainforest — the lungs of our planet!
Brazil is famous for its beautiful beaches, colourful festivals, and football.

LOCATION.intro: Brazil is a giant country — let's find it on the map!

items.title: Brazil in South America
narration: Brazil takes up almost half of South America!
It shares borders with almost every country on the continent.
The Amazon River — the world's largest river by water — flows right through it.

NATURE.intro: Brazil is packed with incredible nature wonders!

items.title: Amazon Rainforest
narration: The Amazon Rainforest is the biggest rainforest on Earth!
It is home to more than three million species of plants and animals.
The trees make so much oxygen that we call it the lungs of the planet.

items.title: Iguazu Falls
narration: Iguazu Falls is one of the most spectacular waterfalls in the world!
It is actually 275 different waterfalls all next to each other.
When you stand next to it, the roar of the water is incredible!

ANIMALS.intro: Brazil has more types of animals than anywhere else on Earth!

items.title: Toucan
narration: The toucan is famous for its enormous, colourful beak!
Even though the beak looks heavy, it is actually very light.
Toucans use their long beaks to reach fruit on branches.

items.title: Jaguar
narration: The jaguar is the biggest wild cat in the Americas!
It has beautiful spotted fur that helps it hide in the rainforest.
Jaguars are excellent swimmers — they even hunt fish!

items.title: Capybara
narration: Capybaras are the world's largest rodents — like a giant guinea pig!
They love water and are excellent swimmers.
They are very friendly animals and often make friends with other species!

FOOD.intro: Brazilian food is delicious and full of colour!

items.title: Açaí Bowl
narration: Açaí is a deep purple berry that grows in the Amazon!
Brazilians blend it into a thick smoothie bowl with fruit and granola.
It is one of the healthiest foods in the world.

items.title: Brigadeiro
narration: Brigadeiro is Brazil's most beloved chocolate sweet!
It is made from chocolate, condensed milk, and butter — then rolled in sprinkles.
Every Brazilian birthday party has a big plate of brigadeiros!

FESTIVALS.intro: Brazil has the world's most famous party — Carnival!

items.title: Carnival
narration: Carnival is the biggest festival in Brazil — and possibly the world!
Millions of people dance in the streets wearing amazing colourful costumes.
Samba dancers train for a whole year to perform at Carnival!

FUN_FACTS.intro: Wow — Brazil is full of amazing facts!

items.title: Football Nation
narration: Brazil has won the Football World Cup more times than any other country — five times!
Football is not just a sport in Brazil — it is a way of life.
The legendary player Pelé is still considered the greatest footballer ever.

items.title: Christ the Redeemer
narration: On top of a mountain in Rio de Janeiro stands a giant statue called Christ the Redeemer.
It is 38 metres tall and watches over the whole city.
It is one of the New Seven Wonders of the World!

items.title: Portuguese Language
narration: Brazilians speak Portuguese — not Spanish like most of South America!
Brazil is actually the largest Portuguese-speaking country in the world.
Hello in Brazilian Portuguese is Olá — say it: oh-LAH!
